properties.name: The Statesman
properties.notes:
Dud. No longer prioritizing. 

FOLLOW UP: End of 2026. 

PREVIOUS STRATEGY: 'Review Risk' Pitch. Found 4 specific resident complaints about inconsistent timing and weekend dumpster mess.

contacts.name: Property Manager
contacts.notes: Target for first Spark Page delivery.

properties.name: The Columns at Pilgrim Mill
properties.notes:
Luxury complex near Lake Lanier. Managed by ECI Management. 

STRATEGY: 'Maintenance Leakage' Pitch. 
Since public reviews are clean, focus on operational efficiency. Maintenance staff is likely losing 5-10 hours/week handling hallway trash and dumpster overflow. 

NEXT MOVE: Send Spark Page with focus on 'Recovered Maintenance Time'.

properties.name: Arbors at Lake Lanier
properties.notes:
Garden-style community near the lake. 

STRATEGY: 'Convenience & Curb Appeal' Pitch. 
Confirmed: NO TRASH CHUTES. Residents must walk bags to central dumpsters. This leads to bags sitting on balconies/breezeways. 

NEXT MOVE: Send Spark Page highlighting 'Resident Convenience' and 'Zero Balcony Trash'.

properties.name: Saddleview Apartments
properties.notes:
Garden-style community off Post Rd. 

STRATEGY: 'Hidden Labor' Pitch. 
No trash chutes found. Centralized dumpster layout. Pitch focuses on recovering maintenance staff time currently spent on grounds cleanup and dumpster area maintenance. 

NEXT MOVE: Send Spark Page with focus on 'Operational Efficiency'.

properties.name: The Foundry at Mashburn Village
properties.notes:
Greystar managed. ALREADY HAS VALET TRASH. 

STRATEGY: 'Service Reliability' Pitch. 
Found resident grievance about not receiving a trash can for 3.5 days after move-in. Greystar properties often use national vendors; focus on being local, responsive, and eliminating move-in friction. 

OUTREACH: Walk-in 6/20 (PM absent). Spark sent 6/20. In-person with Adriana 6/25. Formal quote emailed 6/25. Awaiting green light.

contacts.name: Adriana
contacts.notes: Decision maker. Received formal quote at $11.50/door, Sun-Thu. NetVendor onboarding pending her confirmation.

properties.name: The Heights at Sawnee Village
properties.notes:
RAM Partners managed. Built in 2024. 

STRATEGY: 'Revenue Leadership' Pitch — long-game plant. Year 2 of 5-year Valet Living contract; PM (Ines) says switch unlikely before term ends but requested a quote. 

VISIT: Met Ines in person 6/25. Send standalone quote ($11.50/door, Sun-Thu, 262 units).

contacts.name: Ines
contacts.notes: Year 2 of 5-year Valet Living contract. Asked for quote despite low near-term switch odds.
